Claude Fable 5 will Be Available Again Globally Tomorrow After Export Controls Are Lifted
> Anthropic is redeploying Claude Fable 5 globally after U.S. export controls were lifted, with availability beginning Wednesday, July 1 across Claude's platforms and cloud providers to follow.
> The company has also restored Mythos 5 access for select U.S. organizations and is working with the U.S. government to expand availability through the Glasswing program.
Source:
https://www.anthropic.com/news/redeploying-fable-5

Etched raised $800m with AI inference racks, $1b+ in contracts, and breakthrough low-voltage + cluster-scale memory tech for frontier models
They are building complete AI inference clusters with custom chips that use low-voltage tech for higher performance and shared memory across the system, to ensure huge AI models faster and more efficiently
https://x.com/Etched/status/2071972062202343590?s=20

Why Token Optimization Is a Gift to the Hyperscalers
The shift from "token maxing" to "token optimization" (intelligently routing simpler tasks to cheaper, open-weight models) ultimately accelerates total token volume and drives high-margin infrastructure revenue straight to hyperscalers who act as the essential tollbooths of the AI ecosystem
https://www.uncoveralpha.com/p/why-token-optimization-is-a-gift

Schrödinger’s Liquidity
Financial liquidity looks abundant in aggregate but often proves unavailable for specific obligations when settlement is required
Proposes tokenization as the solution to enable programmable, atomic Delivery-versus-Payment across assets and money for truly reliable liquidity

The Tantalus Trade
The rise of crypto trading apps democratized market access, but this shift is small as companies began staying private much longer
Because massive growth now occurs before an IPO, outdated accredited-investor laws and private incentives effectively exclude retail investors from true wealth generation
https://maybeltr.substack.com/p/the-tantalus-trade

The Outcome Era - When software becomes the customer, companies stop selling access and start charging for outcomes
Explores how business models are shifting as AI agents replace human consumers
The standardization of machine-to-machine commerce will reshape the digital economy. Leverage is shifting toward companies that can turn proprietary data and assets into executable supply that AI agents can easily find, trust, and transact with
https://jonathanmoore.substack.com/p/the-outcome-era

The AI Economy: The Next Chapter
The AI industry is transitioning from chasing the smartest frontier models to optimizing intelligence per dollar, as inference costs plummet and enterprises shift from pilots to production-scale economics, causing most routine workloads to favor efficient models over premium ones
Economic value will increasingly migrate to hyperscalers who own deployed compute infrastructure and orchestration layers (such as AWS Bedrock and Azure AI), which route tasks for cost, compliance, and performance, with geopolitical regulations further reinforcing their central role over pure model developers
https://x.com/rickyho_1989/status/2071932670788198687?s=20
